Topics.Text: I am a 25 year old IT enthusiast looking to work in the industry! I have a degree in Information and Communication engineering from Oulu University of Applied Sciences. Now I am looking for work inside the industry. I have a wide variety of experience from my studies and hobby projects that gives me a good foundation to find my place in the industry. I am most interested in embedded development and web development since these are ones I am quite familiar with and have hands-on software engineering experience with.

Schools.Name: Bachelors of Engineering, Information and Communication Technologies
Schools.Description: I aced my studies at OAMK having an average of 4.4 as my grade for my studies. We studied multiple different frameworks, coding languages and software engineering techniques.

Schools.Name: Savonlinna Lyseo Upper Secondary Middle School
Schools.Description: I studied the Finnish standard upper secondary middle school curriculum. One of the subjects I really fell in love with during these studies was chemistry

Positions.Name: Night shift at the Savonlinna Mailia Oy paper routes
Positions.Description: During my shifts I would have to deliver papers in the designated time frame. Some days were busier than others making me have to adapt day to day.

Positions.Name: Savonlinna Folk Highschool Working as a handyman and a cleaner during each day
Positions.Description: During my civil service I worked at Savonlinna Folk Highscool doing odd jobs as a cleaner, groundskeeper and handyman!

Projects.Name: Database study web app
Projects.Description: During the summer of 2025 I built a website for the university for teaching purposes. The goal was to create a website which allowed the teacher to monitor and create tests which the students would take within the website. The website allowed the user to take tests or play an aracade style mode which had the goal of making the learnign experience fun.

Projects.Name: Movie fan website
Projects.Description: This was done as one of our first React projects. Again the aim was to design and build a full-stack project which allowed users to use data from external APIs to interact within the website itself.

Projects.Name: ATM simulation
Projects.Technologies: Qt Creator, C++, Node.js and SQL Database
Projects.Description: The aim of this project was to build an ATM simulation using an RFID periphiral and windows native code. This was a full-stack project which was one of our first and showed us the ropes of building/designing front-end, back-end and databases.

Projects.Name: Reaction Time Aracade Cabinet
Projects.Description: Using an Arduino microcontroller we built and designed a reaction time game that we built into an arcade cabinet. The time window for this project was tight, but the project turned out good!
